content: We can reframe the Meta Orchestration Agent in parallel reader agent ingestion as an intrinsic curiosity-driven coordinator that uses a configurable ICM module to dynamically allocate unprocessed document chunks to idle reader agents, prioritizing chunks with high prediction error that signal novel, uncharacterized information over routine, easily modeled content. This replaces static load-balancing with curiosity-guided parallel work distribution that automatically surfaces high-value unstructured content faster.
source_topics: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
trigger_topic: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
